text: DATE OF SERVICE: 06/15/2025. Work-related head injury after a pipe fell from the derrick onto the patient's head while working on a drill rig. Denied loss of consciousness. Reagan Memorial Hospital - Medical.
DATE OF SERVICE: 06/15/2025. Emergency Department presentation with head pain, neck pain, and left shoulder pain after the injury. Reagan Memorial Hospital - Medical.
DATE OF SERVICE: 06/15/2025. Exam found left scalp swelling and periorbital bruising around the left eye. Reagan Memorial Hospital - Medical.
DATE OF SERVICE: 06/15/2025. CT head with soft tissue swelling and no intracranial hemorrhage. Electronically signed by Sarah Orrin MD. Reagan Memorial Hospital - Medical.
DATE OF SERVICE: 06/15/2025. CT cervical spine showed a nondisplaced C2 facet and lamina fracture. Electronically signed by Sarah Orrin MD. Reagan Memorial Hospital - Medical.
DATE OF SERVICE: 06/15/2025. Left shoulder and humerus radiographs showed a left scapular body fracture. Electronically signed by Sarah Orrin MD. Reagan Memorial Hospital - Medical.
DATE OF SERVICE: 06/15/2025. Medications given during the encounter included hydromorphone, ondansetron, acetaminophen, ketorolac, and Tdap.
DATE OF SERVICE: 06/15/2025. Urinalysis reviewed during the encounter.
DATE OF SERVICE: 06/15/2025. Patient was accepting physician: Dr. Vretis at Shannon ER for higher level of care. Transfer arranged from Reagan Memorial Hospital - Medical to Shannon Medical Center.
